Produced exactly one allele candidate from the loaded paper:

- Allele notation: `Nfa-g`
- Context: Drosophila Notch facet-glossy mutant

The extraction result was generated and validation metadata was attached by the runtime.

evidence_preview.subsection: Loss of mus-81 does not result in obvious meiotic defects
evidence_preview.verified_quote: C. elegans mus-81(tm1937) mutants exhibited no obvious phenotypes attributed to meiotic defects such as a high frequency of embryonic inviability or an increased frequency of XO males. mus-81 mutants had reduced brood sizes (142+/219, approximately 50% of wild type, Student's t-test p,0.005) (Table 1).

evidence_records.subsection: Loss of mus-81 does not result in obvious meiotic defects
evidence_records.verified_quote: C. elegans mus-81(tm1937) mutants exhibited no obvious phenotypes attributed to meiotic defects such as a high frequency of embryonic inviability or an increased frequency of XO males. mus-81 mutants had reduced brood sizes (142+/219, approximately 50% of wild type, Student's t-test p,0.005) (Table 1).

run_finished.response:
Produced one phenotype assertion candidate for **C. elegans mus-81(tm1937)** with phenotype **reduced brood size**.

Validated/materialized values returned:
- Subject: **mus-81(tm1937)**
- Taxon: **NCBITaxon:6239**
- Phenotype: **reduced brood size**
- Phenotype CURIE: **WBPhenotype:0000154**

evidence_preview.subsection: Loss of mus-81 does not result in obvious meiotic defects
evidence_preview.verified_quote: C. elegans mus-81(tm1937) mutants exhibited no obvious phenotypes attributed to meiotic defects such as a high frequency of embryonic inviability or an increased frequency of XO males. mus-81 mutants had reduced brood sizes (142+/219, approximately 50% of wild type, Student's t-test p,0.005) (Table 1).

trial.prompt: Read the loaded paper and extract exactly one phenotype assertion candidate: the reduced brood size phenotype reported for C. elegans mus-81(tm1937) mutants. Preserve subject, phenotype statement, organism hints, and one record_evidence span-backed evidence record. Do not resolve phenotype ontology IDs in the extractor.
trial.title: Joint Molecule Resolution Requires the Redundant Activities of MUS-81 and XPF-1 during Caenorhabditis elegans Meiosis
